% check a.php
a.php:5:2: $s is of type: string (DEBUG)
a.php:9:1: $i is of type: mixed (DEBUG)
# NOTE: Functions aren't supported for now.

% check b.php
b.php:8:4: $t is of type: mixed (DEBUG)

-- a.php --
<?php

function convert(string $s): int
{
	#debugType $s
}

$i = convert('three');
#debugType $i
-- b.php --
<?php

class Foo
{
	function bar()
	{
		(function($t) {
			#debugType $t
		})();
	}
}
